failures.description: The catalog search dependency timed out, so the agent could not obtain the product count evidence needed to answer the user.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's plan and tool choice matched the user goal: count available Mechanical Keyboard products. At index 3, the required ProductCatalogSearch call was attempted with concrete arguments, and the tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError after 30000ms. The invocation was not malformed, and there was no guardrail/access refusal. The error was not resolved later; the executor and evaluator only propagated the failure.
